LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_FeralGhoulNest.label: feral ghoul nest
LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_GlowingOneContainment.descr: A location with a dangerous glowing one that could potentially be captured.

LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_GlowingOneElimination.descr: A location with an extremely dangerous, berserk glowing one.
